# HiPAMA Placeholder

This directory is reserved for the faithful upstream HiPAMA codebase used in
the richer-contract `P002` scorer lane.

Current status:

- not populated yet
- HiPAMA should be treated as a `P002` project concern from the start because
  it requires richer phone/word/utterance structure than the fixed `P001`
  scorer contract

Target upstream repo:

- <https://github.com/doheejin/HiPAMA>
